changelog.1.10.16: Fixed: report counter on main screen now displays correctly (added updateGameReportCounter and updatePlayerCounter functions), reports screen now shows correct team reports when switching teams (uses getTeamGames instead of appState.games), end-of-game reports enhanced with soccer field formation visualization with player stats overlay, goals/cards now display with game minutes (Player Name 20', 35'), added 'Goals Against' summary line to report header, improved error handling for old reports with fallback to legacy data, new reports now call ReportService.viewReport() for full enhancements
changelog.1.10.15: Fixed: removed icons from statistics and report table data rows (icons now only in header titles as designed), fixed goalkeeper validation to check for 'GK' position (specific to soccer field spot layout, bottom of field), optimized dropToSidebar() to only update removed player in sidebar instead of rebuilding entire sidebar (eliminates weird all-spots-with-names behavior when returning players to bench)
changelog.1.10.14: Fixed: report counter now counts all completed games (was only counting games with actions), restored icons to statistics table headers and data rows (goals, assists, saves, etc), restored icons to game report table headers with abbreviated column names, removed formation player count validation from game setup screen (moved to formation setup), added period validation to game setup (at least 1 period required), game setup validation improved with match type and period checks, formation setup validation now checks: on-field players match match type count, goalkeeper position is filled, total roster can exceed on-field count for benched/unavailable, validateFormationSetup() called from startGameFromFormation()
changelog.1.10.13: Fixed: player names in team setup stats tab now capitalized, team name now stored in game reports (appState.currentGame.teamName) so stats tab can refer to proper reports by team, formation player count validation kept only on formation setup screen (roster can have more players than field positions for substitutes)
changelog.1.10.12: Critical fixes: fixed statistics tab error (removed incorrect appState.players filter from StatisticsService), added formation player count validation (ensures correct # of players for match type), restored player tile status colors (green=starter on field, blue=benched), implemented complete red card filtering (disabled in openPlayerActionDialog, filtered in openAssistSelectionDialog, validated in completeGoalWithAssist), implemented 2 yellows = red automatic conversion logic with 'converted to red card' message, preserved formation player info in currentGame.formationPlayers for status coloring
changelog.1.10.11: Simplified: reverted renderPlayerGrid() to remove unnecessary status class logic (starter/substitute/unavailable) that was overcomplicating the ui, kept focused card class application (yellow-card/red-card) based on player stats, restored simpler cleaner tile rendering
changelog.1.10.10: Fixed: game setup screen no longer requires substitution time when 'timer not needed' is checked, live game player tiles now display color-coded status (starter/substitute/unavailable) and card states (yellow/red), yellow and red card buttons now properly update tile styling and card counters, end of game report now includes yellow and red card statistics in the table
changelog.1.10.9: Fixed: team setup dropdown now properly switches teams by passing event element to handleTeamChange(), player tiles now appear on game tracking screen with renderPlayerGrid() called on screen entry and in startGameFromFormation(), error messages now auto-hide after 5 seconds like success messages
changelog.1.10.8: Fixed: removed +/- buttons from main screen team selector (team management only on team-setup), added black background styling to team-setup screen's team-name section, fixed formation screen unavailable slot tap selection (now detects unavailable source correctly), improved bench spot handling - empty spots stay visible when players placed on field, fixed setupFormation() to create game before showing formation screen (prevents 'no game selected' error), enhanced dropToSidebar() to completely rebuild sidebar with proper event listeners
changelog.1.10.7: Fixed: formation screen sidebar rebuild when players dropped back from field - now properly shows all available players instead of trying to re-enable deleted DOM elements, verified all JavaScript syntax is valid
changelog.1.10.6: Fixed: main screen player counter now updates on team change, team selector moved into black banner line (main and team-setup screens), formation screen unavailable slots are now draggable with event listener reattachment, formation screen bench spots cleared when players placed on field
changelog.1.10.5: Fixed player position capture on creation, separated team player counter ID from main screen counter, added team name banner and team selector to main screen
changelog.1.10.4: Critical fixes: clearAppData now resets multi-team structure, fixed all appState.players references (editPlayer, savePlayerEdit, deletePlayer, recordAction, game tracking), fixed formation screen unavailable slot clearing, added position field to player objects
changelog.1.10.3: Critical fixes: unified player counter on all screens, formation screen player duplication, team management UI reorganization (team selector only on team-setup screen)
changelog.1.10.2: Bug fixes: FormationScreen drag/drop/tap handlers, player counter updates, team switching on all screens, delete team button, 2-team limit
changelog.1.10.1: Bug fixes: handleTeamChange, addNewTeam updateUI, StatisticsService team isolation
changelog.1.10.0: Multi-team functionality - manage distinct teams (U10 men, U9 women, etc)
